10.evidenceText: The Schwalbe Clik Valve introduces a new and effortless way to inflate your bike tires. With a simple click, the pump connects securely to the valve.
10.extractionRationale: The provided content excerpt from the product page contains only product description text and does not include any pricing information (retail price, EUR amount, or price-related text).

30.sourceTitle: Schwalbe Clik Valve - Multiple listings on BIKE24
30.evidenceText: All 5 product listings examined contain only product descriptions and titles. No stock status information (such as 'out of stock', 'nicht verfügbar', 'ausverkauft', or 'currently unavailable') is present in the provided content.
30.extractionRationale: Stock status indicators cannot be determined from the available text. The product descriptions do not include any availability or stock information, so the percentage of out-of-stock listings cannot be calculated.

56.evidenceText: Schwalbe Schlauch - No. 17, Nr. 15, No. 19, No. 17-EL (Extra Light), No. 13 - all with Clik Valve (SCV). Excludes Umrüstkit (conversion kits) and accessories.
56.extractionRationale: Counted distinct inner tube models with Clik Valve interface from sources: No. 17 (28"), Nr. 15 (28"/700C), No. 19 (27.5/28/29"), No. 17-EL (Extra Light), and No. 13 (26"). Excluded conversion kits (SV-SCV Umrüstkit) and other accessories as instructed.

62.sourceTitle: Aluminium Premium Duty paid US Midwest Historical Prices
62.extractionRationale: Extracted the most recent price of 1,793.99 from the data table (Oct 29, 2025). Interpreted this as cents per pound based on typical aluminum premium quoting conventions and converted to USD/lb by dividing by 100: 1,793.99 ÷ 100 = 17.94 USD/lb
